title: (ENG SUB) Aqours 6th Live! Ocean Stage Behind the Scenes Day 1
description:
File Contains:

Aqours 6th Live! Ocean Stage Behind the Scenes Day 1 (ENGLISH SUBBED).mp4

Subs are from @ShinyMikan_658 on Youtube and are being provided here with permission as an archiving measure against copyright.

Love Live! Sunshine!! Aqours 6th LoveLive! ~KU-RU-KU-RU Rock 'n' Roll TOUR~  is Aqours' sixth solo live concert tour that took place in Vantelin Dome in Nagoya on February 12 & 13, 2022 (OCEAN STAGE). The Blu-ray Memorial BOX of OCEAN STAGE was released on November 2, 2022. Included with the Blu-ray Memorial Box was Making of "Aqours 6th LoveLive! ～KU-RU-KU-RU Rock 'n' Roll TOUR～ ＜OCEAN STAGE＞" which is provided here with english subs.

title: [Milotic] Vigilante (비질란테) (2023) S01 (WEB-DL 720p DDP 5.1 h264 Disney+) [Dual-Audio] [Multi-Subs]
description:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/xHcLjYM.jpg)
___

**Synopsis**

When Kim Ji-Yong was a child, his mother was beaten to death by a thug for no reason on the street. The thug only received 3 and half years in prison. Kim Ji-Yong is now an adult and he sees that his mother's killer hasn't changed at all. Kim Ji-Yong takes matters into his own hands and beats him brutally.

Since then, Kim Ji-Yong begins living two totally different lives. During the weekdays, he is a model student at the police university, but, during the weekends, he punishes criminals who received ridiculously light sentences and continue to commit criminal acts. Kim Ji-Yong is now called Vigilante and he receives help from Jo Gang-Ok, who admires him. Meanwhile, Jo Heon, who is the team leader of a police investigation team, chases after the man called Vigilante. Choi Mi-Ryeo is a reporter of a broadcasting station and she covers Vigilante.
___

description:
[mangaupdates](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series/leb0966), [LINE Webtoon](https://www.webtoons.com/en/fantasy/lullaby/list?title_no=4154).
| Info     |                                      |
| -------- | ------------------------------------ |
| Author   | MJ                                   |
| Artist   | Baeklee                              |
| Genres   | Drama, Romance, Shoujo, Supernatural |
| Type     | Manhwa                               |
| Year     | 2022                                 |
| Chapters | 1-48                                 |
**Synopsis**:
Seohwa finally gets hired at the best mattress company in the country, but its CEO, Cheolsu Gam, turns out to be a sleep demon who hasn't been able to sleep for 600 years! Upon meeting, he suspects that she's his human partner - the only person who can make him fall asleep and allow him to return to the demon world. It's strictly business, but there’s undeniable chemistry between the two of them. Will he be able to go back to the demon world, or will her sudden inability to sleep thwart their destiny?

2024-07-12-fr

2MAN LIVE by Azsagawa and Awairo (Yunosuke, WaMi), artists belonging to KAMITSUBAKI STUDIO/SINSEKAI RECORD.
The two acts, who have had a close relationship for a long time, will finally perform together at a live event in a real venue.

KAMITSUBAKI STUDIO／SINSEKAI RECORD所属のアーティスト、梓川とAwairo(雄之助、WaMi)の2MAN LIVE。
かねてよりゆかりの深い2組がついにリアル会場のライブで共演。

title: [Fastgon] Kimitachi wa Dou Ikiru ka (2023) [1080p BDRip HEVC E-AC3 Atmos] [Audio dual] [Sub. Español] | The Boy and the Heron | El Chico y la Garza
description:
![es a propósito no me funen otra vez aaaaaaaaaaaaaa](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.kek.sh/ybM4VqvS9Dz.png&h=480)

---

Holis.

¿Sabían que no hay subtítulos oficiales en español latino para esta película? Yo tampoco. Me di cuenta en realidad están en castellano mientras la veía. FLUX me mintió :(
Pero, los subs en castellano son bastante decentes. Así que, en vez de hacer un *rilis* desde cero que probablemente quede peor que los prosubs, decidí ~~descastellanizar~~ descolonizar los subs españoletes al Latino y agregarle su doblaje con audio de Amazon (mayor bitrate que Apple TV y el USBD!) porque me pareció bueno.

**Ah, y el título es clickbait. En realidad es el encode de motbob del UHDBD en 1108p. Lo puse así porque es cercano a 1080p y por SEO.**
Timing de motbob también.


¿Quieres solo los subs? [Puedes descargarlos desde aquí](https://subsindex.zgn.moe/0:/Movies/Kimitachi%20wa%20Dou%20Ikiru%20ka%20(2023)/).

----

Información:
* Video: HEVC 10 bits @ 2048x1108 [1108p]
* Audio 1: Japonés [E-AC3 5.1 con Dolby Atmos] (Apple TV AU)
* Audio 2: Español Latino [E-AC3 5.1] (Amazon Video MX)
* Subtítulo 1: Español Latino (sin honoríficos)
* Subtítulo 2: Español Latino (con honoríficos)
* Subtítulo 3: Español Latino (forzados)

Se recomienda el reproductor MPV para la correcta visualización de los subtítulos.
Disfrútalo :)

-----
**.:ZagonSubs:.** |  [Donaciones](https://ko-fi.com/therealzagon) - [Telegram](https://t.me/zagonsubs) - [GitHub](https://github.com/ZagonSubs)

title: [千夏字幕组&喵萌奶茶屋&VCB-Studio] 少女与战车 最终章 / GIRLS und PANZER das FINALE / ガールズ＆パンツァー 最終章 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [M1-M4]
description:
![](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/07/14/70004991_p0_master1200_800.webp)  
  
少女与战车 最终章 / GIRLS und PANZER das FINALE / ガールズ＆パンツァー 最終章 M1-M4 BDRip  
  
外挂 5.1 音轨、DTS Headphone X 音轨和双评论音轨。  
MKA contains FLAC 5.1, DTS Headphone X, and two commentary tracks.  
  
本番由 **组员提名** ，应要求制作。感谢他们为 VCB-Studio 发展做出的无私奉献。  
This project was **nominated by our members** and produced upon request. Thanks to them for their selfless dedication to the development of VCB-Studio.  
  
这个项目与 **千夏字幕组 & 喵萌奶茶屋** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Airota & Nekomoe kissaten**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
《少女与战车 最终章》基本是原生 FHD 制作，画面锐利，纹理丰富。线条质量较好，我们只进行了轻度的抗锯齿处理。然而平面质量就不太理想了，本片动态场景较多，还有一层较重的噪点，而过多的音轨又挤占了视频部分的码率，最终结果就是大部分噪点被压碎成大颗粒的色块和烂噪。在烂掉的噪点层下面，我们还发现了一些色带，在色度平面上尤为明显。基于以上问题，我们尽量去除了烂掉的动噪，进行强力的去色带处理，然后用一些不太占码率的噪点来重构噪点层。  
"Girls und Panzer das Finale" is primarily produced in native FHD, showcasing sharp visuals and rich textures. The line quality is decent. Only minimal anti-aliasing is applied. However, the flat areas are less than ideal. Despite the numerous dynamic scenes and a layer of heavy noise, the video bitrate is still low because the four audio tracks take up too much space. Consequently, much of the noise has resulted in blocking and grain blocking during encoding. Additionally, banding is found beneath this noisy layer, particularly noticeable in the chroma plane. To address these issues, we have worked to remove the badly-encoded dynamic noise as much as possible, applied strong debanding, and reconstructed the noise layer using a more bitrate-efficient noise.  
  


* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:   
总监 / Script: sinsanction   
压制 / Encode: SatoruQ   
整理 / Collate: Lapluis   
发布 / Upload: diazchika   
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员   
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:   
Scans: {wfhtony, Passion}@U2  
CDs: {EzoMomonga, nicedesune, a107567251}@JPopsuki  
  


* * *

VCB-Studio 已不再保证收集作品相关 CD 和扫图资源，详情请参见 <https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331>。  
Please refer to <https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331> for more information about that VCB-Studio will no longer guarantee to include relevant CDs and scans.  
  
本组（不）定期招募新成员。详情请参见 <https://vcb-s.com/archives/16986>。  
Please refer to <https://vcb-s.com/archives/16986> about information of our (un)scheduled recruitment.

日本人の皆様へ、このトレントを見てくれてありがとうございます！
普通、漫画の英語版しかをアップロードしないんですけど、みんなが楽しく読めるために原作、つまり日本語版もこれからアップするつもりです。

*English Translation...*
--'For the Japanese people, thanks for taking a look at this torrent!
Usually I would only upload the English versions of most manga, but so that everyone can enjoy reading these works, I have decided to also upload the original 'Japanese version' from now on too.
Of course, if there are any series that you would like to see in Japanese, I would be happy for you to let me know'


**Note from Mr. Kimiko: Working in conjunction with a friend in Japan to bring about these releases. Many more to come!

**2024 Note**: Working on Japanese Digital Manga again. Over 600 books from Amazon.jp & Bookwalker.jp coming soon.

Enjoy. **!!Watermark Free!!**

title: [AV1ARY] Sengoku Youko Yonaoshi Kyoudai-hen (BD 1080p AV1 Opus)
description:
**[use mpv](https://thewiki.moe/tutorials/mpv/) - issues such as broken/artifacty video or subtitle rendering reported on other players like VLC will be ignored and treated as a non-issue. [see this](https://rentry.co/vee-ell-cee) on why VLC is fucking shit**

| Sengoku Youko Yonaoshi Kyoudai-hen       |            |
| ------------- |:-------------:| -----:|
| Video source      | JPBD |
| Audio     | JP 2ch (Opus 160kbps)     |
| Subtitles | English, Portuguese, Spanish, Arabic, French, German, Italian, Russian, Spanish (Latin America)      |
| Encoder | SVT-AV1-PSY 2.1.0-A |
| Encoder settings | `--preset 2 --crf 19 --lp 2 --film-grain 13 --irefresh-type 2 --aq-mode 2 --scd 0 --lookahead 120 --tune 3 --qm-min 9 --sharpness 3 --enable-dlf 2 --enable-overlays 0 --adaptive-film-grain 1 --keyint -1 --frame-luma-bias 38 --qp-scale-compress-strength 2 --variance-boost-strength 2 --recode-loop 4` | 
| Additional software | NMKODER, AV1AN (7 workers, 2 threads per worker) |

[MediaInfo](https://paste.sh/zQlTcuhQ#WypF_TvT7YQ3_jwY8OyB_3mR) | **__[DDL (mega)](https://mega.nz/folder/IqtB1Q7B#mVkCnf2q0wnLd79gMVdrJQ)__** | [Source v Encode comps](https://slow.pics/c/OEzCwxoT)

**major issues? feedback? hate? just want to rave about the show? leave a comment**

subs taken from Erai-raws. shifted +1 second to sync with BDs, and did some minor restyling. all other languages were simply retimed without any further modifications. only episodes 11 and 12 had chapters, so i had to hand-make them for the rest of the episodes

description:

___

# ALIENOID : The Return to the Future




***

Remux perso :

Video : 

Alienoid.2.Return.to.the.Future.2024.German.DL.HDR.2160p.WEB.h265-W4K

Audio & SUB FR :

Alienoid.The.Return.to.the.Future.2024.PROPER.VOSTFR.1080p.WEB.H264-FW





___

Le film suit les conséquences des événements du premier volet, avec les lignes temporelles de la dynastie Goryeo et du présent qui continuent de s'entrelacer de manière complexe.

Passé (Dynastie Goryeo) :
    Le groupe de guerriers et de mages, toujours à la recherche de l'épée divine, découvre de nouveaux secrets sur ses pouvoirs et son origine.
    De nouveaux antagonistes, plus puissants et mystiques, émergent, posant une menace plus grande pour nos héros historiques.

Présent :
    Le gardien extraterrestre Guard et son robot Thunder continuent leur mission de surveiller les prisonniers extraterrestres enfermés dans des corps humains sur Terre.
    Mu-reuk, la jeune femme qui avait découvert le portail temporel, se trouve désormais en possession de connaissances et de pouvoirs acquis à travers ses voyages temporels.
.
.
Alienoid : The Return to the Future" est apprécié pour ses effets visuels époustouflants, ses séquences d'action palpitantes, et son récit complexe mais engageant. 
La suite réussit à élargir l'univers établi dans le premier film tout en maintenant un équilibre entre l'action, la mythologie et la science-fiction.



___

title: Alienoid.2022.2160p.VOSTFR.{EN.GER.KOR.SUBS}UHD.BluRay.HDR.x265.E-AC3.-JJ
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/stcy5RG/alienoid-001.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# ALIENOID




***

Remux perso :

Video : 

Alienoid.2022.German.DTSHD.2160p.UHD.BluRay.HDR.x265-JJ

Audio KOR & Sub FR : 

Alienoid.2022.MULTi.1080p.WEB.H264-FW




___

Alienoid suit deux histoires parallèles qui finissent par se croiser. 

La première histoire se déroule à l'ère de la Dynastie Goryeo, tandis que la seconde se situe dans le présent.

Passé (Dynastie Goryeo) :     
Un groupe de guerriers et de mages cherchent une épée divine avec des pouvoirs extraordinaires. 
Ils sont impliqués dans des batailles et des quêtes mystiques.

Présent :     
Des extraterrestres surveillent les humains et utilisent la Terre comme une prison pour enfermer les criminels de leur planète dans des corps humains. 
Un gardien extraterrestre, appelé Guard, et son robot Thunder, travaillent pour contenir ces prisonniers.

À mesure que les deux lignes temporelles se déroulent, il devient clair que les événements passés ont des répercussions sur le présent. 
Les personnages du passé et du présent doivent travailler ensemble pour faire face à une menace extraterrestre commune.

.
.


Des arts martiaux, des séquences d'action dynamiques, de l'humour, de la sorcellerie, des robots, des aliens et des vaisseaux : un mélange unique de genres
Des paysages somptueux, des effets spéciaux bluffants, des cascades (que serions nous sans les accidents de voitures coréens ?) des rebondissements et une gamine prête à tout.
Le film combine habilement la science-fiction moderne avec des éléments de la mythologie et de l'histoire coréennes, offrant une expérience cinématographique riche et diversifiée.



___

title: The Prince's Keeper: The Cursed Prince is Too Fluffy to Resist! 001-009 as v01-02 (Digital-Compilation) (Oak)
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP! Global](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/327).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3072 **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- These volumes start with **right-side page** first (no inner cover page), start with **two** pages on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- All image filenames are tagged and are having page numbers according to the ToC.

-----

Volumes 01-02 contain chapters 001-009.

title: The Prince's Keeper: The Cursed Prince is Too Fluffy to Resist! 001-009 (2023-2024) (Digital) (Oak)
description:
Obtained directly from [Manga UP! Global](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/327).
[Converted and denoised](https://pastebin.com/ZeY9fqxW) x3072 **4-bit (16 Colors) PNG** images, split dual-pages are merged.

*All image filenames are tagged and have the correct page number, including dual-page images.*
- These chapters start with the left-side page first, start with a single page on dual-view readers for correct page order.
- Split chapters by Manga UP! are bundled together as a complete chapter.

title: [Team ONIBE] Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! LIVE & FAN Meeting Tour ~Welcome to Yuigaoka!!~
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/JKFeUg0.png"")

Liella!'s first live and fan meeting tour was the first time Liella!'s second-generation members appeared publicly on stage. Held in three cities (Osaka, Tokyo, and Nagoya) across eleven performances, the talk portion was the birthplace of many iconic moments in Liella!'s history. The live portion of this event also marked the first time the Season One Blu-ray bonus songs were performed live.

As the second round of Liella!'s second live and fan meeting tour draws to a close, join us in revisiting the very start of Liella!'s journey as a nine-member group. Do enjoy this trip back down memory lane, and we hope that it gets you more excited for the final leg of the tour this August!

This is a non-profit fan translation. If you enjoyed it, please support Love Live! and Liella! by buying the official Blu-ray if possible.

title: Tokyo.Godfathers.2003.BluRay.1080p-FHD.HEVC.VF.VOSTFR.{EN.ESP.SUBS}.DTS.HR-DR
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/H760rTz/2526.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# Tokyo Godfathers




***

Remux perso :

Video : 

Tokyo Godfathers (2003) + EXTRAS [BluRay 1080-FHD HEVC OPUS Dual] HR-DR

Audio : 

DTS JAP : Tokyo.Godfathers.2003.MULTi.1080p.BluRay.DTS.x264-DELiCiOUS

DTS FR : Tokyo.Godfathers.2003.MULTi.1080p.BluRay.REMUX.AVC.DTS-HDMA-VaCa7





___

Gin est un véritable raté. Alcoolique de surcroît et complètement ruiné, il a abandonné sa femme et son enfant alors qu'ils étaient au bord du gouffre. 
Hana est une femme transgenre hypersensible qui rêve de devenir maman. 
Tandis que Miyuki, elle, est une jeune adolescente délinquante et peu gênée qui a fuit du domicile familial à la suite d'une violente dispute avec son père. 
Ces trois bons amis vivent ensemble dans les rues de Tokyo.

Par une nuit fraîche de Noël, en fouillant les poubelles, ils entendent les cris d'un enfant et découvrent rapidement un bébé abandonné, emmitouflé dans un berceau.

Hana voit en ce nouveau-né un véritable miracle ; un ange de Dieu tout droit descendu des cieux qui lui donnerait enfin la chance de devenir mère. 
Les trois décident alors de le garder quelques temps, afin de retrouver sa mère et de lui passer un sermon.

Commence alors pour ces trois sans-abri une épopée fantastique et complètement déjantée dans les rues de la capitale.
.



Tokyo Godfathers prend la forme d'une fable humaniste extrêmement touchante et d'une infinie tendresse, sans jamais avoir recours au pathos ou à une morale superflue. 
Il jette un oeil bienveillant sur ses personnages mal assortis qui se chamaillent, une drôle de famille recomposée attachante qui en recomposera d'autres sur leur passage. 
Tout cela au cours de leurs aventures rocambolesques culminant dans un final tout aussi échevelé qu'émouvant, de leurs tribulations dans les lieux les plus improbables, entre rires et larmes, certainement là où le génie du Satoshi Kon de Tokyo Godfathers réside, la sincérité des humbles à fleur de peau.

Jamais complaisant, parfois évident, "Tokyo Godfathers" ne puise pas son génie dans la surprise ou le suspense, et l'on n'est jamais narrativement pris au dépourvu. 
La force et le talent de ce magnifique long-métrage réside en sa sincérité, et non pas en sa vérité.



___

title: [derp] My Deer Friend Nokotan - S01E02 (WEB 1080p AVC E-AC-3) [Dual Audio] | Shikanoko Nokonoko Koshitantan
description:
Quick mux of My Deer Friend Nokotan with CR video and AMZN audio. This is my first time muxing an airing show, so I apologize for any potential delays in the future.

CR subtitles are much better than before. The script seems to be more polished compared to episode 1, and signs are in their typical style instead of using the dialogue track. You might prefer these over le même's subtitles ([script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/fI8vrsiN/)).

A couple of other releasers seem to have also picked up this show, and their subtitles look pretty promising. If you can wait, I suggest getting either [DeerGod](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=%5BDeerGod%5D+Shikanoko+Nokonoko+Koshitantan) or [YouDeer](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=%5BYouDeer%5D+Shikanoko+Nokonoko+Koshitantan) (or any other properly TL/TLC'd release) instead. I will continue to maintain these releases for those who do not want to wait.

CR subtitles are restyled.

---

----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Video     | [[SubsPlease]](https://nyaa.si/user/subsplease?f=0&c=0_0&q=Shikanoko+Nokonoko+Koshitantan+1080p)

Subtitles | English - [[le même]](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=%5Ble+m%C3%AAme%5D+Shikanoko+Nokonoko+Koshitantan) v2

[MediaInfo](https://pastebin.com/CL4vKEer)

title: Madan no Ou to Michelia [LN ~ v01] (Lord Marksman and Michelia)
description:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/34LbNW2.png)

Title: Madan no Ou to Michelia / Lord Marksman and Michelia

Author: Tsukasa Kawaguchi

Illustrator: Itsuka Miyatsuki

Genres: Action, Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy

Translation: [Infinite Novel Translations](https://infinitenoveltranslations.net/madan-no-ou-to-michelia/)

---

> The Lord Marksman and Michelia novel series is an alternative parallel world to Kawaguchi's Lord Marksman and Vanadis light novel series, with Ludmila instead of Eleonora as the main heroine. In this alternate world, Zhcted does not declare war on Brune, but instead forms an alliance to wage war against the kingdom of Muozinel. A young man named Tigre goes to war in his father's place, and his first taste of battle begins to go well, until Brune's battle lines crumble to an ambush. The commander of Tigre's unit flees, until Ludmila, the Vanadis warrior of Olmutz, comes to the rescue. Two years after that battle, Tigre and Ludmila have a chance reunion, just as the curtain is raised on a new war, and a legendary evil awakens.

---

Time ago I uploaded this novel translation https://nyaa.si/view/1533119 , however it was just an edited MTL draft from an unknown source. Here's the new translation from the group who did all the main Vanadis light novel tl.

**Synopsis**

When Jeong Ji-An was little, her mother was murdered by her father and her father took his own life on the day of her grandmother's funeral. Jung Ji-An was suddenly left all alone. Her uncle, Jeong Jin-Man, took her in and they lived together. While raising Jeong Ji-An, Jeong Jin-Man ran a mysterious shopping mall. Jeong Ji-An eventually enrolled in a university and left her uncle's home. She began to live by herself. One day, Jeong Ji-An hears that her uncle has suddenly passed away. title: [喵萌奶茶屋&西农YUI&VCB-Studio] Comic Girls / こみっくがーるず 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [Reseed Fin]
description:
![Comic-Girls_800px_banner.jpg](https://img.2222.moe/images/2019/09/12/Comic-Girls_800px_banner.jpg)  
  
Comic Girls / こみっくがーるず BDRip Reseed  
  
这个项目与 **喵萌奶茶屋** 和 **西农YUI** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Nekomoe kissaten** and **YUI-7**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
本作原生作画分辨率仅有 720p，导致 BD 原盘线条较为模糊并且存在少量的锯齿，但是像色带这样的问题在原盘中几乎没有见到，为此我们针对性目视锐利度进行了补偿，并且消除了锯齿。BD 上噪点很细，且强度略高，所以我们对不同视觉区域的噪点强度做了一些调整，节约码率的同时，最大程度保留了纹理细节和目视观感。顺带一提，本作 BD 画面中几乎所有线条都存在一定的色彩偏移，线条边缘有彩虹般颜色分离效果。在讨论修复这个问题的过程中发现同样由本番制作公司 Nexus 制作的 GRANBELM 也存在这个问题，并且无法完美的修复，因此我们认定这是特效而不是制作问题。  
The native resolution of this anime was only 720p, which resulted in blurry lines and minor aliasing, whereas artifacts such as colour-banding are hardly found in the original source. We compensated visual sharpness and applied anti-aliasing. The noises from BD are fine particles and they are a bit high in strength, so we made some adjustments to strength of noises in different visual areas to save bitrate as well as maximumly maintaining texture details and visual experience. What's more, The lines in this anime have some chroma aberration effect, resulting in lines surrounded by blue/red border that resembles a mini rainbow. While discussing how to fix this problem, we also found it in GRANBELM which was made by the same production company Nexus, and it cannot be perfectly fixed; thus we believe this is a certain visual effect rather than an artifact.  
  

* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 修正第6、10话的错误字幕；  
2\. 删除字幕文件中的 Aegisub Garbage；  
3\. 重新打包字体包；  
4\. 删除 readme about WebP.txt；  
5\. 调整部分特典的命名；  
6\. 按现行规范重新整理 CD。  
  
Reseed comment:  
1\. Corrected wrong subtitles in episode 6 and 10;  
2\. Removed Aegisub Garbage in subtitle files;  
3\. Repackaged font pack;  
4\. Deleted readme about WebP.txt;  
5\. Renamed some bonus files;  
6\. Re-collated CDs according to current standards.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
总监 / Script: MysteryG  
压制 / Encode: 就想睡个觉  
整理 / Collate: Lapluis  
发布 / Upload: Demo  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
Scans: majin3@U2  
CDs: majin3@U2, 小岩井吉乃@TSDM, yAMABiKo@HAYAKU  
  

* * *

本次发布来自 VCB-Studio 旧作重发计划。我们会不定期重发过去发布过的合集，或为补充做种，或为修正制作错漏，或为整合系列合集。  
This is a release of VCB-Studio Reseed Project. We would re-upload previous torrents from time to time, to resurrect old torrents with few seeders, to correct errors/omissions, or to batch separate releases that belong to a same series.  
  

* * *

description:
![logo](https://asianwiki.com/images/9/97/Red_Swan_KD-p.jpeg)
___

**Synopsis**

Red Swan tells the story of Oh Wan-soo, a woman born into a poor family, who turns her life around and becomes a world-class golfer, catching the attention of many, including her future husband, Kim Yong-guk, the heir to the Hwain Group. Struggling to pay off her mother's debts, Wan-soo agrees to marry Yong-guk, but soon becomes unhappy when she finds out about her husband's affair. For over a decade, she lives with her husband and is determined to make it work, but things begin to change quickly when she faces the biggest night of her life. Shortly after arriving in Manila for the first time as a Goodwill Ambassador, Wan-soo is caught in a gunfight, but narrowly escapes death thanks to the heroism of her company bodyguard, Seo Do-yoon. Soon after, Wan-soo develops feelings for Do-yoon and reflects on her life up until that night, but is unsure of what Do-yoon's true motivations are for working for the Hwan Group.

When a swarm of giant bugs threatens to wipe out humanity, the world’s only defense is a group of humans with special abilities called Butterflies. For Maehwa Baek, Butterflies are just heroic people he sees on TV until a tragic event brings him to the scientists that created them. **Synopsis**

Red Swan tells the story of Oh Wan-soo, a woman born into a poor family, who turns her life around and becomes a world-class golfer, catching the attention of many, including her future husband, Kim Yong-guk, the heir to the Hwain Group. Struggling to pay off her mother's debts, Wan-soo agrees to marry Yong-guk, but soon becomes unhappy when she finds out about her husband's affair. For over a decade, she lives with her husband and is determined to make it work, but things begin to change quickly when she faces the biggest night of her life. Shortly after arriving in Manila for the first time as a Goodwill Ambassador, Wan-soo is caught in a gunfight, but narrowly escapes death thanks to the heroism of her company bodyguard, Seo Do-yoon. Soon after, Wan-soo develops feelings for Do-yoon and reflects on her life up until that night, but is unsure of what Do-yoon's true motivations are for working for the Hwan Group.

title: 有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　特別編！暮らしを支える匠の技スペシャル！
description:
有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　特別編！暮らしを支える匠の技スペシャル！
[総合] 
2024年07月13日 午後8:15 〜 午後8:55 (40分)
暮らしに欠かせないさまざまなモノをメンテナンスし、安全を守るプロフェッショナルたちの匠の技を一挙大公開！一般人立ち入り禁止！成田空港にあるヒミツの工場にも潜入！


![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/C3KI4EB.png"有吉のお金発見　突撃！カネオくん　特別編！暮らしを支える匠の技スペシャル！")


	私たちの暮らしに欠かせないさまざまなモノをメンテナンスし、安全を守るプロフェッショナルたちの匠の技を一挙大公開！海外からニンジャと絶賛される職人集団の風車メンテナンス！地下鉄のヒミツの路線、その先にある整備工場の裏側を徹底調査！飛行機の機体の大掃除に、滑走路を洗浄する超高圧路面清掃車、さらに未公開ブロック！空港にある一般人立ち入り禁止の飛行機のエンジン整備工場にも潜入！そこで見た驚きの光景とは！？

description:
We got lotsa options.

Video and Japanese and English audio from YouDeer. Spanish and Portuguese audio from Tsundere-Raws.

English subtitles from DeerGod, YouDeer, LWL, Subsplease (Crunchyroll), anon, le même v2, and YouDeer (Signs/Songs). Also grabbed a bunch of multi-language subs from Tsundere-Raws.

This was motivated by the fact that YouDeer nuked the Detective Conan and Kindaichi Case Files references for Sherlock and Columbo. Was just gonna mux in DeerGod subs to YouDeer's release for private use, but decided to might as well go all the way. I don't plan to do future episodes.

## What is this?

Hello again from your friends at </redacted/>!                            
                                                                                                          
DeerGod put out an excellent Episode 1, and LWL released a pretty decent Episode 2. However, it lacked all sorts of polish one would normally expect of fansubs, and had a somewhat clunky script. That's where we come in!
                                                                           
Using LWL's subs as a base, we went over it with a fine comb, retranslating a fair chunk of the script, re-timing and re-styling everything, etc. It ended up taking about 5 hours to translate and another 4 hours to fix timing and QC. Thanks a ton for your solid work!
                                                                           
We don't understand why someone would take a week to butcher someone else's script and replace all the references with localization. But then again what can you expect from a group that doesn't have one person on staff that can understand Japanese or speak English natively?             
                                                                           
We hope to see DeerGod continue doing episodes in the future. We aren't sure if we'll do any further episodes. It depends on if we find the time. 
                                                                           
Many thanks to the kind anon that showed up and did the timing work! Also we'd like to encourage LWL to keep doing releases as well. While you were very speedy and did a good job, you might want to spend a little more time polishing it next time.           
                                                                           
Sidenote: About a year ago we said Sherlock Holmes was always shit. We meant it! Not sure why you'd reference a morphine addict instead of Conan-kun.                                           
                                                                           
Looking forward to either 100+ angry comments or not being listed at all as per usual. If you find this release useful please share it. As always you're encouraged to take anything in this release to use for your own.   
                                                                           
As long as you speak English natively that is...                          
                                                                           
Note: If we get around to it we might do a batch release once this is finished airing and the BDs are out. But no promises. Sorry for the delay on getting other projects out. We're pretty busy IRL. Since we have jobs and families and don't beg for donations and live off other people's tax money.                                           
                                                                           
## GREETINGS!: 

[DeerGod], [LWL], [CA], [A-Flux] and that anon that keeps us in steady supply of Onimai raws.                           

## Sources used:

- Video: Ioroid and Nekomoe/LoliHouse
- Audio: Ioroid and Nekomoe/LoliHouse
- Subtitles: Original translation by anon
- Chapters: YES! We made chapters for this release.

## How to play:

All our releases are designed for playback on set-top devices (e.g. AppleTV, Firesticks, Xbox One) with native .ass rendering support provided you use a good software player. For most devices we suggest KODI with either a third party Plex or Jellyfin plug-in. For AppleTV we HIGHLY suggest Infuse. Which will play back our releases for free since we use AAC/Opus audio. ## What is this?

Hello again from your friends at </redacted/>!                            
                                                                                                          
DeerGod put out an excellent Episode 1, and LWL released a pretty decent Episode 2. However, it lacked all sorts of polish one would normally expect of fansubs, and had a somewhat clunky script. That's where we come in!
                                                                           
Using LWL's subs as a base, we went over it with a fine comb, retranslating a fair chunk of the script, re-timing and re-styling everything, etc. It ended up taking about 5 hours to translate and another 4 hours to fix timing and QC. Thanks a ton for your solid work!
                                                                           
We don't understand why someone would take a week to butcher someone else's script and replace all the references with localization. But then again what can you expect from a group that doesn't have one person on staff that can understand Japanese or speak English natively?             
                                                                           
We hope to see DeerGod continue doing episodes in the future. We aren't sure if we'll do any further episodes. It depends on if we find the time. 
                                                                           
Many thanks to the kind anon that showed up and did the timing work! Also we'd like to encourage LWL to keep doing releases as well. While you were very speedy and did a good job, you might want to spend a little more time polishing it next time.           
                                                                           
Sidenote: About a year ago we said Sherlock Holmes was always shit. We meant it! Not sure why you'd reference a morphine addict instead of Conan-kun.                                           
                                                                           
Looking forward to either 100+ angry comments or not being listed at all as per usual. If you find this release useful please share it. As always you're encouraged to take anything in this release to use for your own.   
                                                                           
As long as you speak English natively that is...                          
                                                                           
Note: If we get around to it we might do a batch release once this is finished airing and the BDs are out. But no promises. Sorry for the delay on getting other projects out. We're pretty busy IRL. Since we have jobs and families and don't beg for donations and live off other people's tax money.                                           
                                                                           
## GREETINGS!: 

[DeerGod], [LWL], [CA], [A-Flux] and that anon that keeps us in steady supply of Onimai raws.                           

## Sources used:

- Video: Ioroid and Nekomoe/LoliHouse
- Audio: Ioroid and Nekomoe/LoliHouse
- Subtitles: Original translation by anon
- Chapters: YES! We made chapters for this release.

## How to play:

All our releases are designed for playback on set-top devices (e.g. AppleTV, Firesticks, Xbox One) with native .ass rendering support provided you use a good software player. For most devices we suggest KODI with either a third party Plex or Jellyfin plug-in. For AppleTV we HIGHLY suggest Infuse. Which will play back our releases for free since we use AAC/Opus audio. ___

**Synopsis**

Red Swan tells the story of Oh Wan-soo, a woman born into a poor family, who turns her life around and becomes a world-class golfer, catching the attention of many, including her future husband, Kim Yong-guk, the heir to the Hwain Group. Struggling to pay off her mother's debts, Wan-soo agrees to marry Yong-guk, but soon becomes unhappy when she finds out about her husband's affair. For over a decade, she lives with her husband and is determined to make it work, but things begin to change quickly when she faces the biggest night of her life. Shortly after arriving in Manila for the first time as a Goodwill Ambassador, Wan-soo is caught in a gunfight, but narrowly escapes death thanks to the heroism of her company bodyguard, Seo Do-yoon. Soon after, Wan-soo develops feelings for Do-yoon and reflects on her life up until that night, but is unsure of what Do-yoon's true motivations are for working for the Hwan Group.

***

**Jiisan Baasan Wakagaeru | じいさんばあさん若返る | Grandpa and Grandma Turn Young Again | Дедушка и бабушка вновь стали молодыми [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** комедия, романтика
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 11 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 11 из 11
**Дата выпуска:** c 07.04.2024 по 16.06.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Gekkou](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=1309)
**Снято по манге:** [История о дедушке и бабушке, которые вернулись к своей молодости](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=5817)
**Автор оригинала:** [Арайдо Кагири](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=820038)
**Режиссер:** [Нисида Масаёси](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=24534)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11855), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=29353), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18153), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/56230)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniBaza](https://t.me/Ani_Baza)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Сёдзо и Инэ Сайто — пожилая пара с яблочной фермы в префектуре Аомори. Они много лет были вместе, у них есть и дети, и внуки. Это история о дедушке и бабушке, которые вернулись к молодости. Сёдзо и Инэ просто в один день проснулись снова молодыми. Как же они этим воспользуются?

title: [SubsPlus+] Plus-Sized Elf - S01E02 (AMZN WEB 1080p AVC EAC3) (Uncensored) | Elf-san wa Yaserarenai
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.* 
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

|           | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |



---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

title: [Toolsmith] Dahlia in Bloom - 02 - Memories of Being with Carlo [CR WEB 1080p] (Madougushi Dahlia wa Utsumukanai)
description:
We get to see Lucia in this episode!

Didn't know Chihiro was gonna do this series, whoops. Not sure if I'll keep uploading since their subs are probably better, depends on the demand for same-day subs. This episode wasn't as bad timing-wise as episode 1, so there wasn't as much to do.

A/V & chapters from CR@VARYG.

Subtitles are modified CR. There's a secondary subtitle track that replaces some words that CR translated differently from the light novel's English translation, e.g. "Magic Artificer" -> "Magical Toolmaker". I personally prefer the LN translation, but YMMV.

Other Changes:
- Modified styling (dialogue font, episode num & title, next episode title screen)
- Changed some wording to make it less stiff and clarify some of the more confusing translations
- Changed some timing. Mostly removing gaps.

title: High School Return of a Gangster S01 (2024) 1080p Viu WEB-DL AAC 2.0 H.264
description:
Kim Deuk Pal is a 47-year-old gangster who is the #2 guy in his gang. He doesn't have an educational background due to his poor parents, but he dreams of attending a university. Deuk Pal has been studying to achieve his dream, but it's not easy. One day, he sees a young man, Song Yi Heon, about to kill himself. At that time, Deuk Pal's spirit possesses the body of the suicidal 19-year-old high school student. Deuk Pal soon learns that Yi Heon is a victim of bullying, which has caused him to want to take his own life.

Now, in Yi Heon's body, Deuk Pal takes on the bullies to punish them and becomes friends with classmate Choi Se Kyung. Se Kyung is a model student who appears to be in a perfect situation but suffers from domestic violence at home by his father.

title: 新プロジェクトＸ　男子バスケ　世代を越えた逆転劇～オリンピック４８年の挑戦～
description:
新プロジェクトＸ　男子バスケ　世代を越えた逆転劇～オリンピック４８年の挑戦～
[総合] 
2024年07月13日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:15 (45分)
４８年ぶりで五輪に自力出場するバスケ男子。弱小国と言われ負け続けながらも諦めなかった不屈の歴史。そして亡き親友への誓いが、奇跡の勝利を呼んだ感動の物語

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/nh5Vaqm.png"新プロジェクトＸ　男子バスケ　世代を越えた逆転劇～オリンピック４８年の挑戦")


	４８年ぶりに自力で五輪出場を果たしたバスケ男子日本代表。奇跡と呼ばれる勝利の陰には弱小国と言われ続けながらも諦めなかった不屈の歴史があった。７０年代の五輪予選で敗退した元代表選手はリストラされてなお、持てる技を現日本代表の息子に伝えた。実業団が次々と廃部する冬の時代を戦った「ミスターバスケットボール」佐古賢一は、亡き友との約束を果たすため次世代の育成にかけた。苦難を乗り越え逆転を果たした熱きドラマ

**Описание:**
34-летнего безработного хикикомори после смерти его родителей выгнали из дома. Всеми отвергнутый и без гроша в кармане, он понимает, что зашёл в тупик и его жизнь могла быть намного лучше, сделай он другой выбор в прошлом. Как раз во время этих размышлений он видит грузовик, несущийся на трёх школьников. Герой бросается спасти подростков, однако сам погибает под колёсами... И перерождается в мире меча и магии в теле младенца по имени Рудеус Грейрат. Теперь он начнёт жизнь с чистого листа и без сожалений.
